summary: Tested Soul Score Display feature on Mira Demo page. All features verified working correctly - low score pets show 'Help Mira know [Pet]' prompt, high score pets show percentage badges. API returns correct overall_score values.

api_tests.my_pets_endpoint_returns_overall_score: PASS - All 7 pets have overall_score field
api_tests.pets_with_varying_scores: PASS - Buddy:0%, Luna:53.1%, Mojo:50%, Lola:20.4%, Mystique:15.3%, Bruno:13.3%, Meister:17.3%
api_tests.score_display_logic: PASS - Correct logic: <=10% shows Mira prompt, >10% shows percentage

frontend_tests.soul_badge_low_score: PASS - Buddy (0%) shows 'Help Mira know Buddy' prompt with ✨ sparkle
frontend_tests.soul_badge_high_score: PASS - Luna (32%) shows '32%' badge with amber/gold styling
frontend_tests.pet_dropdown_new_badge: PASS - Low score pets show '✨ New' purple badge
frontend_tests.pet_dropdown_percent_badge: PASS - High score pets show percentage in amber badge
frontend_tests.soul_badge_click_navigation: PASS - Clicking soul badge navigates to /pet-soul/[pet-id] page
frontend_tests.start_soul_journey_button: PASS - 'Start Buddy's soul journey' button visible and styled correctly

features_verified: Soul score badge displays 'Help Mira know [Pet]' when score is 0-10%
Soul score badge displays actual percentage when score is > 10%
Pet dropdown shows '✨ New' badge for pets with score <= 10%
Pet dropdown shows percentage badge for pets with score > 10%
Soul score badge is clickable and navigates to pet-soul page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Soul Score Display feature fully verified. API returns correct overall_score (0-100) for all pets. Frontend correctly shows 'Help Mira know [Pet]' prompt for scores <=10% and percentage badge for scores >10%. The implementation uses weighted scoring from calculate_pet_soul_score() function. Test user has 7 pets with varying scores.
screenshots: soul_02_mira_demo.png - Shows Mira Demo page with 'Help Mira know Buddy' badge
soul_04_dropdown.png - Shows pet dropdown with different badge types
